summary.en: Vietnam BESS installations should be checked for fire-prevention, construction, permitting, and local police fire-safety review requirements applicable to the site. For lithium BESS, project reviewers may request layout separation, ventilation or gas management, thermal-runaway mitigation, fire detection and suppression design, emergency shutdown, access for responders, and Vietnamese-language emergency procedures.
summary.zh: 越南BESS安装应核查适用于场址的消防、建设、许可及当地公安消防审查要求。对于锂电BESS，项目审查方可能要求布置间距、通风或气体管理、热失控缓解、火灾探测和灭火设计、紧急停机、救援通道及越南语应急程序。
summary.zht: 越南BESS安裝應核查適用於場址的消防、建設、許可及當地公安消防審查要求。對於鋰電BESS，項目審查方可能要求布置間距、通風或氣體管理、熱失控緩解、火災探測和滅火設計、緊急停機、救援通道及越南語應急程序。

standards_or_laws: Vietnam fire-prevention and firefighting legal requirements applicable to the site
Vietnam construction and fire-safety technical regulations applicable to the building or installation
Local fire-authority and project-owner review requirements

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2022, and project-specific fire-safety review for stationary energy storage. These GB-standard cn_common_equivalent documents are useful technical inputs but do not replace Vietnam local fire-safety review or installation approval.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2022及项目消防审查管理固定式储能。这些GB-standard cn_common_equivalent文件是有用的技术输入，但不能替代越南当地消防安全审查或安装批准。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2022及項目消防審查管理固定式儲能。這些GB-standard cn_common_equivalent文件是有用的技術輸入，但不能替代越南當地消防安全審查或安裝批准。

gap.en: The gap is installation approval and emergency design, not only product testing. Exporters should prepare fire-risk analysis, container or room layouts, equipment separation, detection and suppression design, ventilation calculations, emergency shutdown logic, emergency response instructions, and commissioning inspection records for Vietnamese project review.
gap.zh: 差距在于安装批准和应急设计，而不仅是产品测试。出口商应准备火灾风险分析、集装箱或房间布置、设备分隔、探测和灭火设计、通风计算、紧急停机逻辑、应急响应说明和调试检查记录，以供越南项目审查。
gap.zht: 差距在於安裝批准和應急設計，而不僅是產品測試。出口商應準備火災風險分析、集裝箱或房間布置、設備分隔、探測和滅火設計、通風計算、緊急停機邏輯、應急響應說明和調試檢查記錄，以供越南項目審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Vietnamese fire-prevention, construction, permitting, or local fire-authority review applies to the installation; additional BESS-specific evidence may be project, insurer, lender, or owner required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval and local fire review

source.publisher: Government of Vietnam Legal Documents Portal

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China GB battery and system reports do not close the Vietnam installation fire-safety gap. Prepare a site-specific fire and emergency package for local review before shipment, installation, or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB电池和系统报告不能覆盖越南安装消防安全差距。出货、安装或调试前，应准备针对场址的消防和应急资料包以供当地审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB電池和系統報告不能覆蓋越南安裝消防安全差距。出貨、安裝或調試前，應準備針對場址的消防和應急資料包以供當地審查。
